name: Artichoke Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the macaroni according to package instructions. Drain well and rinse with cold water.
2. Drain the macaroni again and transfer it to a large bowl.
3. Add the artichoke hearts and their liquid, mushrooms, cherry tomatoes, olives, parsley, and basil.
4. Gently toss all ingredients together.
5. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 4 hours before serving.
6. Before serving, season with salt and pepper to taste.
